raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>, I learned via online banking that my monthly payment made XXXX XXXX 's on XX/XX/XXXX, was declined due XXXX  non sufficient funds in my bank account. The representative confirmed the declined payment XXXX  took my payment by phone XXXX  removed the declined fee due XXXX  my years of positive payment history XXXX  length of credit. However, I was not told that XXXX 's would continue XXXX charge my bank account for the initial payment, and on XX/XX/XXXX a retry payment was successfully deducted from my account, along with the second payment I made by phone which was deducted on XX/XX/XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, I called customer service XXXX  was told I needed XXXX  send proof of the double payment XXXX  an email address given XXXX  me. XXXX 's sent an online letter XXXX  confirm the dispute, but no mention of the documents provided, through my online portal. This agent assured me they were received XXXX I needed XXXX  wait XXXX  days again. I waited XXXX  days without contact from XXXX XXXX and on XX/XX/XXXX I called again for an update. The agent said.my refund was processed, but that he needed me XXXX  verify my full bank account XXXX  routing number, XXXX  be sure they sent it XXXX  the right place. It was not. And on XX/XX/XXXX I received an online letter stating that my dispute was declined due XXXX  lack of evidence. My online account also does not show the XXXX  payment made from XX/XX/XXXX.
